transcript: Speaker A: स्वागत है उनका जो मेरा रास्ता रोकते हैं। अजी प्रणाम है उनको जो मेरा रास्ता रोकते हैं। शेर तब भी नहीं रुकता जब सौ कुत्ते भौंकते हैं। [Welcome to those who block my path. My respects to those who block my path. A lion still doesn't stop when a hundred dogs bark.]
on_screen_text:
Bank of India + ₹ 2,01,768 Credited to Account 0002
अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App [To become the richest person in your family, download Zinglish App]
Zinglish: English Speaking App
summary: The ad associates learning English with financial success by showing cash and bank credit alerts. A motivational Hindi voiceover plays as the user is prompted to download the Zinglish app to become wealthy.
